DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.title: Dooming Strength
DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add X [red]Strength[/red] where X is half the ammount of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself. Remove this [red]Strength[/red] at the end of your turn.
DOOMING_STRENGTH_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add X [red]Strength[/red] where X is half the ammount of [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself. Remove this [red]Strength[/red] at the end of your turn.
STATUS_QUO_POWER.title: Status Quo
STATUS_QUO_POWER.description: [gold]Status[/gold] cards will now count as [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards for all purposes.
STATUS_QUO_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]Status[/gold] cards will now count as [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] cards for all purposes.
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.title: Hellfire Breathing
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HELLFIRE_BREATHING_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.title: Hell's Gate
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, add a random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your hand.
HELLS_GATE_OPEN_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, add 1 random [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card into your hand.
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.title: Saved by Corruption
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.description: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is drawn or Exhausted, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
SAVED_BY_CORRUPTION_POWER.smartDescripti: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is drawn or Exhausted, gain {Amount} [gold]Block[/gold].
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.title: Mana Circulation
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.description: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is Exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
ENERGY_CIRCULATION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card is Exhausted, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}
CAREFUL_PLANNING_POWER.title: Careful Planning
CAREFUL_PLANNING_POWER.description: Whenever you draw a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards}.
CORRUPTED_FORM_POWER.title: Corrupted Form
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.title: Hellfire Pact
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw 1 card.
HELLFIRE_PACT_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a [jitter][purple]Curse[/purple][/jitter] card, draw 1 card.
THECORRUPTED-SUMMON_ARMY_NEXT_TURN_POWER: At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon Army 4[/gold].
At the start of your next turn, [gold]Summon Army {Amount}[/gold].
UNSTABLE_ENERGY_POWER.title: Unstable Energy
UNSTABLE_ENERGY_POWER.description: At the start of your turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every {DoomPower:diff()} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself.
UNSTABLE_ENERGY_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn gain {Energy:energyIcons()} for every {DoomPower:diff()} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] stacks on yourself.
ARMY_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.title: Army Empowerment
ARMY_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.description: [gold]Command Army[/gold] deals double damage to the enemy this turn.
ARMY_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]Command Army[/gold] deals double damage to [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] {Amount:plural:this turn|for the next [blue]{}[/blue] turns}.
THECORRUPTED-ARMY_OF_DOOM_POWER.title: Army Of Doom
THECORRUPTED-ARMY_OF_DOOM_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon Army {Amount}[/gold] and apply {Amount} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
THECORRUPTED-ARMY_OF_DOOM_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, [gold]Summon Army {Amount}[/gold] and apply {Amount} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
DOOMSDAY_POWER.title: Doomsday
DOOMSDAY_POWER.description: Whenever you apply [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter], deal damage to all enemies.
DOOMSDAY_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you apply [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter], deal {Amount} damage to all enemies.
GROUP_SUMMONING_POWER.title: Group Summoning
GROUP_SUMMONING_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Summon Army[/gold], ALL other Players also [gold]Summon Army[/gold].
GROUP_SUMMONING_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you [gold]Summon Army[/gold], ALL other Players also [gold]Summon Army[/gold].
TRAMPLE_POWER.title: Trample Power
TRAMPLE_POWER.description: [gold]Command Army[/gold] now deals damage to ALL enemies.
TRAMPLE_POWER.smartDescription: [gold]Command Army[/gold] now deals damage to ALL enemies.
DOOMING_CORRUPTION_POWER.title: Dooming Corruption
DOOMING_CORRUPTION_POWER.description: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], apply [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
DOOMING_CORRUPTION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], apply {Amount} [jitter][pink]Doom[/pink][/jitter] to yourself.
RITUALISTIC_SUMMONS_POWER.title: Ritualistic Summons
RITUALISTIC_SUMMONS_POWER.description: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], apply [gold]Summon Army[/gold].
RITUALISTIC_SUMMONS_POWER.smartDescripti: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], apply [gold]Summon Army {Amount}[/gold].
CLEANSE_WITH_RITUALS_POWER.title: Cleanse With Rituals
CLEANSE_WITH_RITUALS_POWER.description: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], perform [gold]Cleansing[/gold].
CLEANSE_WITH_RITUALS_POWER.smartDescript: Each time you perform a [gold]Ritual[/gold], perform [gold]Cleansing {Amount}[/gold].
DOOMED_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.title: Doomed Empowerment
DOOMED_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.description: Your [gold]Doomed[/gold] and [gold]Corrupted[/gold] cards deal their normal damage and effects when autoplayed.
DOOMED_EMPOWERMENT_POWER.smartDescriptio: Your [gold]Doomed[/gold] and [gold]Corrupted[/gold] cards deal their normal damage and effects when autoplayed.
DEVOUR_SOULS_POWER.title: Devour Souls
DEVOUR_SOULS_POWER.description: When an enemy dies, gain max HP.
DEVOUR_SOULS_POWER.smartDescription: When an enemy dies, gain {Amount} max HP.
